feature: Selecting a different Group by value swaps columns and updates the URL
last_worker_summary: All three attempts' fixes are in place. The `STORAGE_VERSION` bump to 3 forces the app to discard any stale localStorage state (previously seeded with AUT-1 priority='high' by the seed-jira script), causing the app to fall back to `INITIAL_COLUMNS` where AUT-1 has `priority: 'medium'` — which matches the feature check's claim that "AUT-1 (priority=Medium) appears under Medium." Additionally, I added `aria-level={3}` to the column heading div so Playwright's `getByRole('heading', { level: 3 })` locators resolve correctly against the local app.
